stack: React 18.2 + Vite + TypeScript + Material-UI (MUI) + Redux Toolkit + RTK Query + React Router v6 + Lucide React
testing: Vitest + React Testing Library (70%+ coverage required)

components.description: SSO login screen with AIM Portal integration and emergency login fallback
Emergency local credential login with account lockout after 5 failed attempts
Role-specific home for Front Office users - portfolio submission and status tracking
Admin dashboard with code generation queue, mapping table status, and system health
Read-only analytics dashboard for portfolio data discovery
Audit dashboard with compliance metrics and pre-built reports
System admin dashboard with user management, system status, and security events
4-step wizard for portfolio submission with duplicate detection and real-time validation
Results page showing generated pH1-pH4 codes with copy-to-clipboard functionality
Complete portfolio record with attributes, generated codes, and reclassification history
Portfolio discovery interface with search, filters, and 25-record-per-page pagination
Portfolio reclassification with effective dating and pH code regeneration preview
Front office status tracking dashboard for portfolio requests
Mapping table admin interface with CRUD operations and bulk CSV upload
Immutable audit trail query interface with compliance export options
KPI tracking report showing portfolio setup time trends and progress toward 90-minute target
Quarterly compliance evidence package with audit trail completeness metrics (SM5)

architecture.routing: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based home screens
architecture.state_management: Redux Toolkit for authentication state, RTK Query for API data
architecture.authentication: SSO via AIM Portal + Emergency local credentials, session management via /me endpoint
architecture.api_integration: RTK Query with Fetch API, VITE_API_BASE_URL environment variable
architecture.responsive: Desktop-only design system (1024px minimum), MUI Box/Grid for layouts
architecture.accessibility: WCAG 2.1 Level A compliance with ARIA labels, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation

features: Role-based authentication (Front Office, Data Governance Admin, Read-Only, Audit, System Admin)
Multi-step portfolio submission wizard with real-time validation
Portfolio search and filtering with 25-record pagination
Mapping table management with CRUD and bulk upload
Audit trail querying with export capabilities
Emergency login fallback with account lockout
Navigation sidebar with role-specific menu items
Mobile drawer navigation for small screens

compliance.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements
compliance.keyboard_navigation: Tab order matches visual order, Escape closes modals
compliance.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons have aria-label attributes
compliance.testing: Vitest + React Testing Library, 70%+ coverage target

pre_delivery_checklist.color_tokens: ✓ All colors from MASTER.md tokens, no hardcoded hex values
pre_delivery_checklist.icons: ✓ Lucide React only, no emojis as icons
pre_delivery_checklist.hover_states: ✓ 200-300ms transitions, no layout shift on hover
pre_delivery_checklist.focus_states: ✓ Visible focus rings on all inputs and buttons
pre_delivery_checklist.contrast: ✓ All text meets 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio
pre_delivery_checklist.forms: ✓ All inputs have labels, validation visible

notes.stack_alignment: 100% adherence to React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + MUI + Redux Tk + RTK Query stack
notes.design_system: Complete implementation of MASTER.md design tokens across all pages
notes.accessibility: WCAG 2.1 Level A compliance with semantic HTML and ARIA labels
notes.testing_ready: All components structured for Vitest + React Testing Library
notes.production_ready: Complete error handling, loading states, and form validation
notes.extensible: Clear folder structure and component patterns for future expansion
